text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I approach the front gate of the
academy, I catch a glimpse of someone rushing
into a taxi and speeding away.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Hey, you! Have you seen a reporter pass by?
choice_data_list: Someone was hurrying away in a taxi.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That reporter was here to photograph our
training, but the fool used the flash!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I explicitly forbade its usage before we started.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I'll call the publisher later and file a
complaint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After chasing down that reporter, Air Groove
looks a bit worn out.
